settings.html:
<script>
(function(){
 if(window.__ubInit)return; window.__ubInit=1;
 function init(){
  var nav=document.getElementById('ub-nav'), bar=document.getElementById('ub-progress');
  function onScroll(){
    var y=window.scrollY||window.pageYOffset;
    if(nav){ if(y>40){nav.classList.add('ub-scrolled');}else{nav.classList.remove('ub-scrolled');} }
    if(bar){ var h=document.documentElement.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight; bar.style.width=(h>0?(y/h)*100:0)+'%'; }
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll',onScroll,{passive:true}); onScroll();
  var burger=document.getElementById('ub-burger'), menu=document.getElementById('ub-mobile-menu');
  function closeM(){ if(menu) menu.classList.remove('ub-open'); }
  if(burger&&menu){ burger.addEventListener('click',function(){menu.classList.toggle('ub-open');}); }
  var mc=document.getElementById('ub-mclose'); if(mc) mc.addEventListener('click',closeM);
  if(menu){ menu.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function(a){a.addEventListener('click',closeM);}); }
  var rv=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.ub-rv'));
  rv.forEach(function(el){ var d=el.getAttribute('data-d'); if(d) el.style.transitionDelay=parseInt(d,10)+'ms'; });
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
    var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(en){en.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('ub-in');io.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:0.12,rootMargin:'0px 0px -8% 0px'});
    rv.forEach(function(el){io.observe(el);});
  } else { rv.forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('ub-in');}); }
  setTimeout(function(){rv.forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('ub-in');});},3500);
  var counters=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.ub-count'));
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
    var co=new IntersectionObserver(function(en){en.forEach(function(e){
      if(!e.isIntersecting) return; var wrap=e.target;
      var t=wrap.querySelector('.elementor-heading-title')||wrap;
      var raw=(t.textContent||'').trim(); var m=raw.match(/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)/); if(!m){co.unobserve(wrap);return;}
      var num=m[1]; var idx=raw.indexOf(num); var pre=raw.slice(0,idx); var suf=raw.slice(idx+num.length);
      var target=parseFloat(num); var dec=(num.indexOf('.')>-1)?1:0; var dur=1500,start=performance.now();
      function step(ti){var p=Math.min((ti-start)/dur,1);var ease=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);t.textContent=pre+(target*ease).toFixed(dec)+suf;if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(step);else t.textContent=pre+target.toFixed(dec)+suf;}
      requestAnimationFrame(step); co.unobserve(wrap);
    });},{threshold:0.6});
    counters.forEach(function(el){co.observe(el);});
  }
  var hero=document.getElementById('ub-hero');
  if(hero){ hero.addEventListener('mousemove',function(ev){
    var r=hero.getBoundingClientRect(); var cx=(ev.clientX-r.left)/r.width-0.5, cy=(ev.clientY-r.top)/r.height-0.5;
    hero.querySelectorAll('.ub-px').forEach(function(el){var cm=el.className.match(/ub-pxv(m?)(\d+)/);var sp=cm?((cm[1]?-1:1)*parseInt(cm[2],10)):0; el.style.transform='translate('+(cx*sp)+'px,'+(cy*sp)+'px)';});
  }); }
 }
 if(document.readyState!=='loading') init(); else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',init);
})();
</script>
